title: The Whale That Can Sing at 188 Decibels!

scenes.text: A blue whale's call can reach up to 188 decibels, louder than a jet engine!
These calls travel hundreds of miles across ocean waters, making it the loudest animal.
They use their vocalizations for communication and navigation in the deep sea.
Whales can also adapt their frequencies to communicate with each other.
scenes.label: SONG OF THE SEA

scenes.text: Follow for a mind-blowing fact every day.

description: A blue whale's call is louder than a jet engine and can travel hundreds of miles, enabling deep-sea communication. Follow for daily facts!
